sources.label: Tokyo Metro passenger ranking
sources.message: Parsed 41 station rows from Tokyo Metro 駅別乗降人員順位表.

sources.label: Toei Subway passenger volume
sources.message: Parsed 106 station rows (28 canonical matches) from Toei CKAN CSVs: {"asakusa":20,"mita":27,"shinjuku":21,"oedo":38}.

sources.label: Toei Subway accessibility / barrier-free CSV
sources.sourcePeriod: Tokyo Open Data (CKAN t000018d0000000028, refreshed irregularly)
sources.message: Parsed 106 station rows from Toei barrier-free CKAN CSVs: {"asakusa":20,"mita":27,"shinjuku":21,"oedo":38}.

sources.label: Tokyo Metro per-station exit list
sources.sourcePeriod: Tokyo Metro live exit feed (refreshed irregularly per station revision_date)
sources.message: Parsed 1042 exit records across 42 canonical stations from tokyometro.jp/station/exit.json.

sources.label: Line / operator complexity
sources.message: Active from curated area data: derived from stationLines[], complexity tags, and transfer-hub level.

sources.label: Airport / Shinkansen access
sources.message: Route logic from curated accessProfiles. No live timetable or route API data is implied.

sources.label: Lodging density editorial signal
sources.message: Editorial hotel-choice-density signal from lodgingDensityLevel. Not live inventory and not a hotel ranking.

sources.label: Toei Subway per-station exit list
sources.message: Toei station detail URLs return 404 from a script; no comparable feed exists yet. Skipped cleanly.

sources.label: Tokyo Metro accessibility / barrier-free pages
sources.message: Page is client-rendered from a script request; per-station detail pages not parsed in this pass.

sources.label: Tokyo Metropolitan Police town-level crime statistics
sources.message: Not displayed as a safety claim; skipped in this pass.

sources.label: Hazard Map Portal (MLIT / GSI)
sources.message: Heavy GIS — catalogued only, no UI rendering this pass.

sources.label: Tokyo lodging business facility datasets
sources.message: Registered only; not live yet and not used as live hotel inventory.
